title: tobion bubonoides
intro: Tobion bubonoides, also known as the 'Mountain Tobacco', is a flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to repel mosquitoes and other insects due to its high concentration of nicotine and other alkaloids. Tobion bubonoides has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
